_comment: Pro plan config. priceEur is converted automatically to the payer's Mobile Money currency (CFA peg). trialMinutes: waitlist (early access / is_premium) members get them as a free trial before subscribing, and their balance resets to includedMinutes when they go Pro. Non-waitlist members get no trial; their trialMinutes are granted on top of includedMinutes when they subscribe (150 + 10 = 160).
